testcase.name: test_create_psp_transaction_stores_reserve_fund_amount
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_psp_currency_conversion.py:109: in test_create_psp_transaction_stores_reserve_fund_amount assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create transaction failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create transaction failed: {"detail":"Possible duplicate: Similar transaction created 2026-02-25T21:41:37.873944+00:00 (Transaction ID: tx_f2fb689237d9). Wait 5 minutes or use a unique reference."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
